name: agentic-pay
description: Non-custodial payment engine for AI agents — BTC, ETH, USDT, USDC, XRP, XMR, ZEC.

agentic_pay_agent_id.title: Agent ID
agentic_pay_agent_id.description: Identifier for this agent, used to look up its spend-limit policy in config.json.

agentic_pay_config.title: Config path
agentic_pay_config.description: Absolute path to your config.json (spend limits, API keys, static prices). Defaults to config/config.json in the install directory.

btc_wif.title: BTC WIF key
btc_wif.description: WIF-encoded Bitcoin private key for the funding wallet. Only required if using the BTC rail.

eth_rpc_url.title: ETH RPC URL
eth_rpc_url.description: EVM JSON-RPC endpoint URL. Only required if using the ETH/USDT/USDC rails.

eth_private_key.title: ETH private key
eth_private_key.description: 0x-prefixed Ethereum private key for the funding wallet. Only required if using the ETH/USDT/USDC rails.
